'''zhapogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nibber|nibber]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-p-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nibber|nibber]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhapogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæpegeth|zhæpegeth]] || [[word:zhæpegej|zhæpegej]] || [[word:zhæpegesh|zhæpegesh]] || [[word:zhæpege|zhæpege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhapopogoth|zhapopogoth]] || [[word:zhapopogoj|zhapopogoj]] || [[word:zhapopogosh|zhapopogosh]] || [[word:zhapopogo|zhapopogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhapogoth|zhapogoth]] || [[word:zhapogoj|zhapogoj]] || [[word:zhapogosh|zhapogosh]] || [[word:zhapogo|zhapogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhapofgoth|zhapofgoth]] || [[word:zhapofgoj|zhapofgoj]] || [[word:zhapofgosh|zhapofgosh]] || [[word:zhapofgof|zhapofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhapogotho|zhapogotho]] || [[word:zhapogojo|zhapogojo]] || [[word:zhapogosho|zhapogosho]] || [[word:zhapogoko|zhapogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhapogoth|zhapogoth]] || [[word:zhapogoj|zhapogoj]] || [[word:zhapogosh|zhapogosh]] || [[word:zhapogo|zhapogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhapogothol|zhapogothol]] || [[word:zhapogojol|zhapogojol]] || [[word:zhapogoshol|zhapogoshol]] || [[word:zhapogokol|zhapogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhapogothotho|zhapogothotho]] || [[word:zhapogojojo|zhapogojojo]] || [[word:zhapogoshosho|zhapogoshosho]] || [[word:zhapogoko|zhapogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhapogothon|zhapogothon]] || [[word:zhapogojon|zhapogojon]] || [[word:zhapogoshon|zhapogoshon]] || [[word:zhapogokon|zhapogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhapogothoro|zhapogothoro]] || [[word:zhapogojoro|zhapogojoro]] || [[word:zhapogoshoro|zhapogoshoro]] || [[word:zhapogokoro|zhapogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
